hooks.command:
input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | tr -d '
' | sed -n 's/.*"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\(\([^"\]\|\.\)*\)".*/\1/p'); if ! printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|`][[:space:]]*|\$\([[:space:]]*)git[[:space:]]+(commit|push)([[:space:]]|$)'; then exit 0; fi; TOKEN=/tmp/cardocs-gatekeeper-approved; if [ -f "$TOKEN" ]; then TS=$(cat "$TOKEN" 2>/dev/null); NOW=$(date +%s); AGE=$((NOW - ${TS:-0})); if [ "$AGE" -ge 0 ] && [ "$AGE" -lt 600 ]; then rm -f "$TOKEN"; exit 0; fi; rm -f "$TOKEN"; fi; printf '
=== BLOCKED by commit-gatekeeper ===

No fresh APPROVED gatekeeper review found.

Before retrying this git commit/push, you MUST:
  1. Invoke the commit-gatekeeper skill (Skill tool)
  2. Run the full 10-stage review on the staged diff
  3. Output the mandatory final-format verdict
  4. Only if APPROVED, write the token:
       date +%%s > /tmp/cardocs-gatekeeper-approved
  5. Then retry the git command (token is single-use, valid 10 min)

חסום על ידי שומר הסף - הרץ את סקיל commit-gatekeeper, הפק חוות דעת APPROVED וכתוב את האסימון לפני הקומיט/פוש.
' >&2; exit 2
